plan.failureSummary: The test failed because the cached deterministic instructions expected a 'Last Name' field, but the page displayed a different set of fields ('Your Name', 'Contact Email', etc.).
observedIndicators: Cached selector for 'Last Name' failed to resolve
Failure screenshot shows 'Your Name' label, confirming 'Last Name' is missing
UI contains a 'Set 2' indicator, suggesting dynamic/randomized form versions
Historical data shows a pattern of alternating success/failure typical of dynamic content interacting with static cache

remediationSteps.summary: Clear AI cache and retry test
remediationSteps.details: Clear the page.ai cache for this test and re-run. This will allow the autonomous agent to generate new instructions that match the current form layout ('Set 2').

remediationSteps.summary: Consider disabling deterministic mode for dynamic content
remediationSteps.details: If the survey content is intentionally randomized between runs, consider disabling deterministic mode for this specific page.ai call to ensure the agent always adapts to the visible fields.

plan.notes: The failure screenshot shows 'Set 2' of the survey, while the deterministic cache likely contains instructions for a different set. The overall objective is semantically flexible, so a fresh autonomous run should be able to handle the different form structure.
